calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Heggstad Trust Asset
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carl Durham for and with Andrea Benson.

The Court asked what action Concepcion took after her Husband died to transfer the property into the Trust. Mr. Durham stated that he thinks she thought the property was transferred, that she took out a reverse mortgage after the Husband died in November of 2007 for about $200,000.00 and that other amounts have been taken out. Mr. Durham also stated that they currently have a buyer for the property, that the Attorney for the Title Company is requesting a Heggstad order and that schedule-A was done when the Trust was originally funded. The Petition for Order Confirming Heggstad Trust Asset was taken under submission. The Court directed Mr. Durham to file a supplemental declaration regarding the Title Company and any other information the family members could provide.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
